name: SafeVoice Whistleblower Platform
description: A privacy-first anonymous whistleblower reporting platform aligned with Directive (EU) 2019/1937 and the Polish Act of 14 June 2024 on the Protection of Whistleblowers (Ustawa o ochronie sygnalistów), featuring anonymous code-based case tracking and immutable audit logs. No reporter telemetry is collected and no data is sent to third-party AI services.
